body.raw:
# Input

## Import

```jsx live=false
import { Input } from '@totejs/uikit';
```

## Usage

```jsx
<Input placeholder="Please enter..." />
```

## Sizes

```jsx
<VStack>
  {/* height = 24px */}
  <Input size="sm" placeholder="small size" />

  {/* height = 40px */}
  <Input size="md" placeholder="medium size" />

  {/* height = 50px */}
  <Input size="lg" placeholder="Large size" />
</VStack>
```

## Colors

```jsx
function Example() {
  return (
    <VStack>
      {['primary', 'success', 'warning', 'danger'].map((item) => (
        <Input colorScheme={item} placeholder={item} key={item} />
      ))}
    </VStack>
  );
}
```

## Variants

So far, we only have one variant, we will add more variants in the future.

```jsx
<Input variant="filled" />
```

## Status

### isReadOnly

```jsx
<Input defaultValue="some text..." isReadOnly />
```

### isDisabled

```jsx
<Input defaultValue="some text..." isDisabled />
```

### isInvalid

```jsx
<Input defaultValue="some text..." isInvalid />
```

## With Icons

```jsx
<VStack>
  <InputGroup>
    <InputLeftElement>
      <ValidatorsIcon size="md" />
    </InputLeftElement>
    <Input />
  </InputGroup>

  <InputGroup>
    <Input />
    <InputRightElement>
      <QrcodeIcon size="md" />
    </InputRightElement>
  </InputGroup>

  <InputGroup>
    <InputLeftElement>
      <ValidatorsIcon size="md" />
    </InputLeftElement>
    <Input />
    <InputRightElement w="auto">
      <QrcodeIcon size="md" />
    </InputRightElement>
  </InputGroup>

  <InputGroup size="sm">
    <InputLeftElement>
      <ValidatorsIcon size="md" />
    </InputLeftElement>
    <Input />
  </InputGroup>

  <InputGroup size="sm">
    <Input />
    <InputRightElement>
      <QrcodeIcon size="md" />
    </InputRightElement>
  </InputGroup>

  <InputGroup size="sm">
    <InputLeftElement>
      <ValidatorsIcon size="md" />
    </InputLeftElement>
    <Input />
    <InputRightElement w="auto">
      <Tooltip content="Some text text text text text text text text text text text text text text text text text text text text text text text text text text text text text text">
        <QrcodeIcon size="md" _hover={{ color: 'scene.primary.active' }} />
      </Tooltip>
    </InputRightElement>
  </InputGroup>
</VStack>
```

## Props

<PropsTable
  data={[
    {
      name: 'colorShceme',
      required: false,
      type: '"primary" | "success" | "danger" | "warning"',
      default: '"primary"',
      desc: 'The outline color of input',
    },
    {
      name: 'size',
      required: false,
      type: 'sm | md | lg',
      default: 'lg',
      desc: '',
    },
    {
      name: 'variant',
      required: false,
      type: 'filled',
      default: 'filled',
      desc: '',
    },
    {
      name: 'value',
      required: false,
      type: 'string',
      default: '',
    },
    {
      name: 'defaultValue',
      required: false,
      type: 'string',
      default: '',
    },
    {
      name: 'onChange',
      required: false,
    },
    {
      name: 'isDisabled',
      required: false,
      type: 'boolean',
      default: false,
      desc: 'If true, the input will be disabled.',
    },
    {
      name: 'isInvalid',
      required: false,
      type: 'boolean',
      default: false,
      desc: 'If true, the form control will be invalid.',
    },
    {
      name: 'isReadOnly',
      required: false,
      type: 'boolean',
      default: false,
      desc: 'If true, the form control will be readonly.',
    },
    {
      name: 'isFullWidth',
      required: false,
      type: 'boolean',
      default: false,
      desc: 'If true, the input will take up the full width of its container.',
    },
  ]}
/>
